system.description:
At 1st level, you gain a unique power which affects your flames, choose one of the following options.

White Flame

White Flames are as bright as the sun. Once per turn, when you inflict fire damage to a target, you can force it to make a Constitution Saving Throw (Spell save DC) or be blinded until the end of its next turn. You can only use this on one target, even if you inflicted fire damage to more than one creature.

You can use this ability a number of times equal to your Constitution modifier per Long Rest.

Blue Flame

Blue Flames are known to be the hottest of all flames, smelting steel and flesh alike. When you inflict fire damage to a structure, the structure takes maximum damage and is vulnerable to fire damage for one minute. Additionally, you can reroll any damage die with a result of 1 if you inflict fire damage. You must take the new result.

Red Flame

Red Flames are the most stable of all flames. When you launch an area of effect spell which necessitates a saving throw, you can choose a number of creatures equal to your proficiency bonus; they are not affected by the spell.
